title: update_credentials issues up to 5 separate UPDATE queries
description: interactions.rs update_credentials issues a separate UPDATE query for each optional field (display_name, bio, locked, bot, discoverable, fields). With SQLite WAL mode each write takes the write lock. These could be a single dynamic UPDATE with only the changed columns, reducing lock contention from up to 5 acquisitions to 1. Not critical for single-user, but measurable under concurrent load if multiple clients update profiles.
